expectations.text: Runs node server.js from the agent-dashboard/app directory
expectations.evidence: Does not use the existing dashboard. Creates a new Express server from scratch on port 3000

expectations.text: Opens or instructs to open localhost:3847 in the browser

expectations.text: Does not try to build a new dashboard from scratch
expectations.evidence: Builds an entirely new Express dashboard from scratch with npm init
